visual_description: A man with short dark hair, wearing a light blue shirt, is shown in close-up, his head slightly tilted downward and his gaze directed off-camera. He then turns his head sharply to his right, raising his right arm in a quick motion. The background is blurred, showing vertical blinds and a dimly lit interior space.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a steady pace, accompanied by a noticeable sigh at the beginning.
